title: Theme Studies
description: Three independent studies for the Material Swaps theme.
creative_direction: A first-pass single-image package for Material Swaps: one core demonstration, one applied system, and one gallery-oriented variation, all focused on material physics, optical behavior, and tactile surface detail.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.
